warning.eyebrow: What have you noticed this week?
warning.riskMid: Patterns emerging — trust what you see
warning.alertCoachSuffix: Your coach has been notified and will reach out within 24 hours.
warning.alertDirectSuffix: The on-call coach is one tap away in Support.

recovery.momentumLow: Watch for green shoots — they count
recovery.alertText: 3+ recovery signs logged. Tell them what you see — specific, brief, no strings: "I noticed you've made every meeting this week. I see the work."

signs.label: Open about whereabouts without being asked
Showing interest in others' lives again

privacyNote: Tracking isn't surveillance — it turns anxiety into observation, and observation into a plan. Recovery signs matter as much as warning signs: they teach your eyes what healing looks like.
privacyNoteCoach: Your log is visible to you and your coach.
privacyNoteDirect: Your log is visible only to you.

trajectory.title: Your trajectory
trajectory.subtitle: Six weeks of warning and recovery signs, side by side. Patterns are easier to read across weeks than days.
trajectory.trendWorsening: Warning signs have been climbing lately.
trajectory.trendImproving: Recovery is gaining ground — keep going.
trajectory.trendNone: Log a few weeks to see your trend here.
trajectory.selfCheckTitle: Is it time for an intervention?
trajectory.selfCheckSub: There's no right answer — just notice what feels true. Nothing happens unless you choose it.
selfCheckItems: The same problems keep coming back, even with boundaries in place.
Their use is putting someone's safety at risk.
I've tried talking with them on my own and it hasn't changed things.
I'm running out of next steps I can take alone.
Other people who love them are worried too.
trajectory.selfCheckResult: Several of these ring true. Planning ahead with a professional might help — and you don't have to decide anything today.
trajectory.shareBody: Send your coach a note so they can see how things are trending and reach out.
trajectory.shareDone: Shared — your coach will see this.
trajectory.shareLocked: Turn on coach sharing in Settings to share your trajectory.
trajectory.shareMessage: I'd like to talk about how things have been trending over the last several weeks. Can we connect?
